Our Children’s
Future

Little Wise Kids Childminding is a multilingual service based in a home setting, just behind Cabot Circus car park with easy access to town and the M32.

A warm, home-from-home environment in a convenient central location with easy access to town and the M32.

Our curriculum helps each child recognise and cultivate their talents, building confidence for a bright future.

We combine traditional Early Years learning with modern languages and cultures, incorporating Portuguese and Spanish through play and fun activities.
